capability_definitions.file_read: Read bounded, non-secret text and metadata inside configured roots.
capability_definitions.file_write: Create and replace bounded text files with hash preconditions, audit and quarantine.
capability_definitions.file_delete: Remove regular files or empty directories into quarantine for audit-backed restoration.
capability_definitions.file_destroy: Irreversibly remove regular files or empty directories only through a separate explicit capability.
capability_definitions.audit_verify: Verify the tamper-evident write audit chain.
capability_definitions.rollback_text: Restore a quarantined preimage from an audited replace transaction.
capability_definitions.bundle_registry: Read the curated Lens/repoLens latest-complete bundle registry.
capability_definitions.secret_inspect: Inspect metadata and bounded directory listings under explicit secret roots without returning file content.
capability_definitions.secret_reveal: Break-glass reveal only with a current SHA-256, justification and explicit context-exposure acknowledgement; prefer secret_use.
capability_definitions.secret_use: Run bounded argv-only commands with a secret supplied through an inherited file descriptor or restrictive temporary fallback.
capability_definitions.secret_export: Atomically create a local 0600 copy inside configured secret export roots with a source hash precondition.
capability_definitions.browser_profile_read: Read bounded browser profile metadata and text under explicit browser profile roots; binary databases are metadata-only.
capability_definitions.terminal_execute: Run arbitrary host-visible commands, including shells and privilege frontends, with audit and redacted output.
capability_definitions.durable_job: Start long-running transient user-systemd jobs with extended Trusted Owner budgets.
capability_definitions.git_cli: Run guarded Git commands inside a repository.
capability_definitions.github_cli: Run GitHub CLI with redacted output.
capability_definitions.user_service_control: Inspect and control user-level systemd units.
capability_definitions.tmux_interaction: Read or send literal input to existing tmux panes.
capability_definitions.process_signal: Signal current-user processes with protected PID checks.
capability_definitions.privileged_reference: Create privileged references and use the installed trusted-owner root broker escape hatch.
capability_definitions.power_execute: Run explicitly enabled recovery-gated privileged broker actions.
capability_definitions.resource_lease: Acquire, renew, inspect and release typed collision-control resource leases.
capability_definitions.artifact_transfer: Transfer regular files with hash-bound source and destination preconditions.
capability_definitions.browser_worker: Start and control isolated agent-owned browser workers with loopback-only debugging.
capability_definitions.gui_worker: Start and control isolated Xvfb GUI workers without a remote display listener.

trusted-owner.description: Trusted owner profile: unrestricted host-visible user execution, broad filesystem access, full capabilities, and compatibility with the root broker escape hatch.
